title: Chaos X
description: A mod bringing 100+ random events to Minecraft. Every 60s, a new chaos affects all players at once. Features 4 languages, rare Omega Chaos, and custom timers for an unpredictable, epic survival challenge!
body:
🌀 Chaos X - The Ultimate Chaos Experience

Are you tired of the same old predictable Minecraft survival? Kaos Modu turns your world upside down with a massive system of random events tailored for content creators and thrill-seekers.

🚀 Key Features
230+ Unique Events: From "Visual Chaos" (screen flips, FOV distortions) to "Movement Chaos" (reverse controls, gravity shifts) and "World Events" (lava rain, block melts).
Combo & Legendary Events: Pure insanity where multiple effects stack for "Omega Chaos" scenarios.
Multi-Language Support: Fully localized in English, Turkish, Russian, and Chinese.
Operator Control: Comprehensive command system for streamers to trigger effects manually or adjust the chaos interval.
🛠️ Commands

/chaos enable/disable
: Toggle the chaos cycle.

/chaos interval <seconds>
: Set the frequency of events.

/chaos trigger <event_id>
: Manually fire a specific event.

/chaos list
: View all available event IDs.

/chaos skip/clear
: Skip the current event or immediately stop all effects.

Enjoy!
